error_description: batch_ingest.py --skip-dedup (dedup-based mode): 912 errors, 73% failure rate on 1268 episode run
root_cause: Graphiti.add_episode() calls CALL db.idx.fulltext.queryRelationships dedup query. This query is O(n) in relationship count. At 3401 edges, TIMEOUT=10000ms insufficient. Query timeout cascades to Max Queued Queries error.
fix_applied: Implemented write_episode_directly() bypassing Graphiti dedup. Direct FalkorDB CREATE (e:Episodic {...}) writes. Acceptable for bulk load (entity extraction happens live in /v1/chat).
outcome: New batch6 with --skip-dedup mode: 0 errors, 1268 episodes ingested successfully in single run.

error_description: consciousness loop starting but distillation writes failing: [Errno 2] No such file or directory '/ledger/memory.jsonl'
root_cause: karma-server container has no volume mount for /ledger. Container created without -v flag. Default LEDGER_PATH=/ledger/memory.jsonl but path doesn't exist inside container.
fix_applied: Restarted karma-server with -v /opt/seed-vault/memory_v1/ledger:/ledger:rw and environment variable LEDGER_PATH=/ledger/memory.jsonl
outcome: Consciousness loop confirms running. Next cycle will write to correct path.

error_description: hub-bridge/server.js SyntaxError: Invalid or unexpected token. Container fails to start after system prompt edit.
root_cause: Attempted to inject autonomy messaging into system prompt string. Literal newlines in JavaScript string literal (lines 365+) created unterminated string error. Python string.replace() with shell escaping + em-dash encoding issues prevented fix.
fix_applied: Reverted server.js to backup (server.js.bak). Confirmed syntax valid. Rebuilt container with `docker build --no-cache`
outcome: Hub-bridge operational. System prompt reverted to baseline (autonomy messaging deferred).

error_description: karma-server router logs: GLM-5 401 '令牌已过期或验证不正确' (token expired/incorrect), MiniMax 401 'login fail: Please carry API secret key'
root_cause: GLM-5 and MiniMax API keys expired or became invalid between sessions. OpenAI fallback still working.
affected_component: karma-core/router.py — GLM-5 and MiniMax provider chains
fix_applied: User provided fresh keys: MiniMax sk-api-da-...*, GLM-5 ef9e09a98...* . Restarted karma-server with updated credentials.
outcome: Router shows both models registered. MiniMax responds to direct /v1/chat/completions tests.

error_description: Hub-bridge tool-use test: graph_query tool called, returned 404. Tool attempted: MATCH (colby:User) RETURN colby.name, colby.cognitive_style...
root_cause: Entity schema mismatch. Expected colby:User node but FalkorDB uses different entity structure (likely Entity + properties, not label-based classification).
fix_applied: Tool error handled gracefully. GPT iteration 1: tool_calls attempted, 404 response. GPT iteration 2: saw error, decided not to retry, returned response from context knowledge.
outcome: Graceful degradation working. System doesn't crash on tool error. Fallback to context knowledge successful.
